ocr_findings.description: ROI calculation table (案件A/B/C) rendered with pipe-delimited Markdown but header row appears after data rows due to separator placement. All numeric values (利益, 投資, ROI%) are present and correct.

reviewer_notes: Page 214 is an answer-explanation page (解答 5-17 through 5-25) with full explanations for multiple-choice questions. All answer labels (ア/イ/ウ/エ) captured correctly. ROI table values verified accurate. No high-severity issues.
